filesystem.description: File operations with directory-level access control

stripe.description: 25 tools across 13 resource categories for payments
stripe.note: Already in Vercel env at meok-attestation-api. Pull locally: vercel env pull && source .env

elevenlabs.description: TTS, voice cloning, audio transcription, conversational AI agents
elevenlabs.note: Free tier: 10K credits/month. Sign up at elevenlabs.io

blender.description: Natural-language 3D modeling with Poly Haven integration
blender.note: Requires Blender installed: brew install --cask blender

companies-house.description: 45+ UK company endpoints — profiles, officers, filings, PSC data

slack.description: Slack messaging — send DMs, post to channels, search history
slack.note: Create bot at api.slack.com/apps. Required scopes: chat:write, channels:history, users:read

github.description: GitHub repos, issues, PRs, releases, file ops, workflow triggers
github.note: Generate at github.com/settings/tokens. Required scopes: repo, workflow

postgres.description: Direct PostgreSQL — schema introspection + read/write queries
postgres.note: Already running locally — sov3 uses this for pgvector memory

puppeteer.description: Headless browser automation — fetch, screenshot, interact

brave-search.description: Brave Search — web + local search (2K free queries/mo)

meok-eu-ai-act.description: MEOK EU AI Act compliance — 410 articles FTS5 search + 11 tools
meok-eu-ai-act.note: Install: pip install eu-ai-act-compliance-mcp (v1.4.0 with FTS5)

meok-dora.description: MEOK DORA compliance — 9 tools for financial sector

meok-nis2.description: MEOK NIS2 compliance — 7 tools for cybersecurity directive

meok-attestation.description: MEOK attestation verification — public verify any signed cert
